description: Optional per-KB override for which optional Phase 0 signals run. Absence is valid: every signal defaults to 'auto', resolved from the corpus-profile optional_signal_availability report. This file never changes tier boundaries, gap-cut method, or removes the no-truncation guarantee -- it only turns evidence-gated signals on or off.

signals.description: Each signal is 'auto' (on iff corpus-profile.optional_signal_availability reports material for it), 'on' (force), or 'off' (force).

gap_cut.description: Governs L3 concentration into the per-topic work pack. Never a fixed count: filename/h1/heading tiers are always fully included; only the body tiers are subject to the elbow cut.
